memoryArtifacts.description: Crest design of Weaver with same leaves and helmet design as in his mother's crest; Brouwer crest; and crest of Van Gelder, Nederland (Jewish). These blue coloured leaves may be of Jewish design before 1000.

zh.Presteigne with Discoed, Herefordshire,: 威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼
zh.Wales: 英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德
zh.Presteigne with Discoed, Radnorshire, Wa: 威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Weaver於大約1448年出生在威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼時，他的父親Thomas Weaver37歲，母親Anne Delabere30歲。他於1469年與Lady Jane Apleby在威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1494年在英國賀福爾賀福德享年47歲。

zh-hans.Presteigne with Discoed, Radnorshire, Wa: 威尔士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Weaver于大约1448年出生在威尔士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼时，他的父亲Thomas Weaver37岁，母亲Anne Delabere30岁。他于1469年与Lady Jane Apleby在威尔士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1494年在英国賀福爾賀福德享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Weaver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from an agent derivative of Middle English weven ‘to weave’ (Old English wefan).

English: habitational name from a place on the Weaver river in Cheshire, now called Weaver Hall but recorded simply as Weuere in the 13th and 14th centuries. The river name is from Old English wēfer(e) ‘winding stream’.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘weaver’, for example German Weber , Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Tkacz or Tkach , Hungarian Takács (see Takacs ), and Slovenian Tkalec, Tekavec or Veber .

variants.name: Weber
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a weaver, Middle High German wëber, German Weber, an agent derivative of weben ‘to weave’. This form of the surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, and the Netherlands. In Hungary it is mostly spelled Wéber and Véber. In Russia, Slovenia, Czechia, Slovakia, and Croatia it is (also) established in the Slavicized form Veber , which is in Czechia also spelled Vebr. Compare Waber , Weaber , Weaver , Webber , and Webre .

History: As a name of ultimately Swiss German origin the surname Weber is also established among the American Mennonites. However, descendants of the early Mennonite settlers, who came to PA in the early 18th century, mostly bear the Americanized form of the name (see Weaver ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Weaver was born about 1448, in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales, his father, Thomas Weaver, was 37 and his mother, Anne Delabere, was 30. He married Lady Jane Apleby in 1469, in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1494, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Weaver est né environ 1448, à Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles, son père, Thomas Weaver, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Anne Delabere, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane Apleby en 1469, à Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1494, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Weaver um 1448 in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Weaver 37 und seine Mutter Anne Delabere 30. Er hat 1469 in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales Lady Jane Apleby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1494 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Weaver è nato il circa 1448 nel Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles, il suo padre, Thomas Weaver, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Anne Delabere, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lady Jane Apleby nel 1469, nel Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1494, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Weaverが約1448年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアプレステイグンで生まれた時，父Thomas Weaverは37歳，母Anne Delabereは30歳であった。1469年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアプレステイグンでLady Jane Aplebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1494年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Weaver(이)가 대략 1448년 웨일스 라드노르실르 프레스테익니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Weaver(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Delabere(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1469년 웨일스 라드노르실르 프레스테익니에서 Lady Jane Apleby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1494년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Weaver nasceu aproximadamente 1448, em Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales, seu pai, Thomas Weaver, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Anne Delabere, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jane Apleby em 1469, em Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1494, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Weaver родился около 1448 г. в местности престиин, радноршир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Thomas Weaver было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Delabere, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Apleby в 1469 г. в местности престиин, радноршир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1494 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Weaver nació aproximadamente 1448, en Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales, su papá, Thomas Weaver, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Anne Delabere, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lady Jane Apleby en 1469, en Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1494, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
